commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Control UI/WebChat generated-image frames with Open, Download, and Copy actions, authenticated managed thumbnail/full-image routes, media transcript normalization, and the `gateway.controlUi.imageThumbnailMaxSide` config surface.

Reproducibility: yes. A source diff against current main shows the PR head removes the 2026.5.12 `### Breaking` and `### Fixes` changelog sections while current main still has them.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can restore the accidentally deleted released changelog block without changing runtime behavior.

target.title: feat(ui): add generated image actions
target.body:
## Summary

Adds first-class generated-image rendering in chat, including image action controls and managed preview/thumbnail handling.

- Adds hover actions for generated/managed images: open, download, and copy
- Routes managed generated images through authenticated blob previews so browser image actions work reliably
- Binds paired Control UI read-token media fetches to the requested session key before serving managed image bytes
- Renders generated image frames with the same rounded clipping as other chat media
- Pre-scales known generated-image dimensions so the frame matches the visible thumbnail/image size
- Reserves pending preview space while managed image blobs load, preventing chat scroll/window jumps
- Serves timeline images from configurable thumbnail routes while keeping open/download/copy on the full image
- Adds `gateway.controlUi.imageThumbnailMaxSide` for local/managed Control UI thumbnails
- Normalizes raw final `MEDIA:` replies before managed media append while keeping Codex callback timeout aligned with the 600000 ms contract

## Why

Generated images were being displayed without the full media affordances we expect in chat. The implementation also needed stable thumbnail/frame geometry so the new actions attach to the visible image, rounded corners clip the actual image, and the chat viewport does not jump while a managed preview is still loading.

The follow-up fixes make the preview/full-image split explicit: right-click View Image uses the thumbnail preview, while click/Open/Download/Copy use the original full-size image.

## Testing

- `corepack pnpm test ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm test ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts src/config/config-misc.test.ts src/gateway/control-ui.http.test.ts src/gateway/managed-image-attachments.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.directive-tags.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm config:schema:check`
- `PATH=/tmp/openclaw-corepack-bin:$PATH CI=true timeout 300s pnpm test src/gateway/managed-image-attachments.test.ts`
- `PATH=/tmp/openclaw-corepack-bin:$PATH CI=true timeout 900s pnpm test test/vitest/vitest.acp.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.cron.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.shared-core.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.tasks.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.utils.config.ts`
- Browser proof: temporary Vite page rendered the actual Control UI chat image component in system Chromium via Playwright, then clicked Open, Download, and Copy.

## Branch Notes

This branch is based directly on latest `upstream/main` and intentionally does not include PR #75727 gateway changes.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Generated/managed chat images are served through authenticated thumbnail previews and full-size Open/Download/Copy targets. Current head tested: `e86ec3ca6f05bebe332d15e3cdf8c87783d83c76`.
- Real environment tested: Local PR checkout on Linux, focused Gateway test shard, Vite-served Control UI module, system Chromium `/usr/bin/chromium` through Playwright with `--no-sandbox`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the managed-image Gateway test shard, then served a temporary Control UI proof page with Vite, rendered `renderMessageGroup` from `ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.ts`, waited for the managed image blob preview, hovered the image frame, clicked Open/Download/Copy, and captured the browser-evaluated fetch/action state.
- Evidence after fix:

```text
$ PATH=/tmp/openclaw-corepack-bin:$PATH CI=true timeout 300s pnpm test src/gateway/managed-image-attachments.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  34 passed (34)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 15.50s
```

```text
$ PATH=/tmp/openclaw-corepack-bin:$PATH CI=true timeout 900s pnpm test test/vitest/vitest.acp.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.cron.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.shared-core.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.tasks.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.utils.config.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts src/gateway/managed-image-attachments.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.directive-tags.test.ts
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  111 passed (111)

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.cron.config.ts
Test Files  94 passed (94)
Tests  896 passed (896)

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.shared-core.config.ts
Test Files  10 passed (10)
Tests  68 passed (68)

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.tasks.config.ts
Test Files  12 passed (12)
Tests  157 passed (157)

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.acp.config.ts
Test Files  7 passed (7)
Tests  43 passed (43)

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.unit-ui.config.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  38 passed (38)

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.utils.config.ts
Test Files  7 passed (7)
Tests  77 passed (77)

[test] passed 7 Vitest shards in 343.96s
```

```json
{
  "screenshotPath": "/home/daein/.openclaw/workspace/logs/pr-watch/77017-ui-proof-c5e7eed.png",
  "result": {
    "imageSrcIsBlob": true,
    "imageAlt": "Generated proof image",
    "frameSized": true,
    "frameWidthVar": "160px",
    "frameAspectVar": "160 / 96",
    "actionButtons": [
      { "label": "Open image", "title": "Open image" },
      { "label": "Download image", "title": "Download image" },
      { "label": "Copy image", "title": "Copy image" }
    ],
    "fetches": [
      {
        "url": "/api/chat/media/outgoing/agent%3Amain%3Amain/00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000000/thumbnail",
        "method": "GET",
        "credentials": "same-origin",
        "headers": {
          "accept": "image/*",
          "authorization": "Bearer session-token",
          "x-openclaw-requester-session-key": "agent:main:main"
        }
      },
      {
        "url": "/api/chat/media/outgoing/agent%3Amain%3Amain/00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000000/full",
        "method": "GET",
        "credentials": "same-origin",
        "headers": {
          "accept": "image/*",
          "authorization": "Bearer session-token",
          "x-openclaw-requester-session-key": "agent:main:main"
        }
      }
    ],
    "opens": [
      {
        "target": "_blank",
        "features": "noopener,noreferrer",
        "urlIsBlob": true
      }
    ],
    "downloads": [
      {
        "download": "Generated proof image.png",
        "rel": "noreferrer",
        "hrefIsBlob": true
      }
    ],
    "clipboardWrites": 1
  }
}
```

- Observed result after fix: After merging latest upstream main, the prior current-head `checks-node-core-runtime-shared` timeout was fixed by pinning the legacy cron model-override harness to the embedded-agent mock path, the changelog conflict was resolved, and the merged verification bundle passed locally. The browser rendered the managed generated image from a blob thumbnail preview, displayed the Open/Download/Copy controls, fetched the thumbnail for preview, fetched the full route for actions with the session-bound read token headers, opened a blob URL, prepared a PNG download, and performed one clipboard image write.
- What was not tested: Native OS save dialog behavior is not exercised by headless Chromium; the browser proof verifies the generated download anchor target and filename.
target.author: ittiz

target.title: feat(ui): add generated image actions
target.body:
## Summary

Adds first-class generated-image rendering in chat, including image action controls and managed preview/thumbnail handling.

- Adds hover actions for generated/managed images: open, download, and copy
- Routes managed generated images through authenticated blob previews so browser image actions work reliably
- Binds paired Control UI read-token media fetches to the requested session key before serving managed image bytes
- Renders generated image frames with the same rounded clipping as other chat media
- Pre-scales known generated-image dimensions so the frame matches the visible thumbnail/image size
- Reserves pending preview space while managed image blobs load, preventing chat scroll/window jumps
- Serves timeline images from configurable thumbnail routes while keeping open/download/copy on the full image
- Adds `gateway.controlUi.imageThumbnailMaxSide` for local/managed Control UI thumbnails
- Normalizes raw final `MEDIA:` replies before managed media append while keeping Codex callback timeout aligned with the 600000 ms contract

## Why

Generated images were being displayed without the full media affordances we expect in chat. The implementation also needed stable thumbnail/frame geometry so the new actions attach to the visible image, rounded corners clip the actual image, and the chat viewport does not jump while a managed preview is still loading.

The follow-up fixes make the preview/full-image split explicit: right-click View Image uses the thumbnail preview, while click/Open/Download/Copy use the original full-size image.

## Testing

- `corepack pnpm test ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm test ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts src/config/config-misc.test.ts src/gateway/control-ui.http.test.ts src/gateway/managed-image-attachments.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.directive-tags.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm config:schema:check`
- `PATH=/tmp/openclaw-corepack-bin:$PATH CI=true timeout 300s pnpm test src/gateway/managed-image-attachments.test.ts`
- `PATH=/tmp/openclaw-corepack-bin:$PATH CI=true timeout 900s pnpm test test/vitest/vitest.acp.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.cron.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.shared-core.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.tasks.config.ts test/vitest/vitest.utils.config.ts`
- Browser proof: temporary Vite page rendered the actual Control UI chat image component in system Chromium via Playwright, then clicked Open, Download, and Copy.

## Branch Notes

This branch is based directly on latest `upstream/main` and intentionally does not include PR #75727 gateway changes.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Generated/managed chat images are served through authenticated thumbnail previews and full-size Open/Download/Copy targets. Current head tested: `e86ec3ca6f05bebe332d15e3cdf8c87783d83c76`.
- Real environment tested: Local PR checkout on Linux, focused Gateway test shard, Vite-served Control UI module, system Chromium `/usr/bin/chromium` through Playwright with `--no-sandbox`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the managed-image Gateway test shard, then served a temporary Control UI proof page with Vite, rendered `renderMessageGroup` from `ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.ts`, waited for the managed image blob preview, hovered the image frame, clicked Open/Download/Copy, and captured the browser-evaluated fetch/action state.
- Evidence after fix:

```text
Tests  34 passed (34)

```
